cluster_intro: This cluster groups personas with related strategy patterns around punishment, payoffs, high, player, contributions.

cluster_intro: This cluster groups personas with related strategy patterns around punishment, payoffs, contributions, high, outcomes.

cluster_intro: This cluster groups personas with related strategy patterns around group, punishment, outcomes, contributions, payoffs.

cluster_intro: This cluster groups personas with related strategy patterns around reward, contributions, high, payoffs, rewards.

cluster_intro: This cluster groups personas with related strategy patterns around punishment, payoffs, reward, payoff, contribution.

cluster_intro: This cluster groups personas with related strategy patterns around reward, contributions, payoffs, high, outcomes.

cluster_intro: This cluster groups personas with related strategy patterns around contributions, payoffs, payoff, player, group.
